meaning: adj.声化学的,由声化学现象产生的
examples: The sonochemical decolorization rate constant increased by 6 times after aerating air.
The mechanism of sonochemical actions were discussed in view of mechanical fluctuation and cavitation effect of ultrasound.
Doublefrequency and threefrequency ultrasonic irradiation can significantly improve sonochemical yield with remarkable enhancement effects.
